# zendesk_brand (Data Source)

Look up an existing Zendesk brand by ID, name, or subdomain.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The ID of the brand. Provide one of id, name, or subdomain.
- `name` (String) The name of the brand. Provide one of id, name, or subdomain.
- `subdomain` (String) The subdomain of the brand. Provide one of id, name, or subdomain.

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean)
- `brand_url` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `default` (Boolean)
- `has_help_center` (Boolean)
- `help_center_state` (String)
- `host_mapping` (String)
- `is_deleted` (Boolean)
- `signature_template` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `url` (String)
